cause_analysis.narrative: Somar Wellness Spa | Spa Party & Retreat, Body Massage, Body Scrub, Body Sculpting, Body Contouring, Facial churned on 2026-02-05 after 255 days with Zoca. Sentiment turned negative on 2026-01-13 (sms) — first complaint keyword: "frustrated". Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 10 day(s) before churn via email. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-26 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: BEBE, Your Payment is Due in 2 Days!\n\nBody: I’ve already told you that i cancelled last month in text mes…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
